name: clearbox-multi-ai
description: Hub/chain conversation panel. Up to 10 human or LLM nodes. Zero direct company calls. Full-fidelity session storage. Uses whatever AI extension you have installed.

clearboxMultiAi.knownExtensions.description: AI extensions to probe for exported chat APIs. Each entry: { "id": "extension.id", "method": "exportedMethodName", "label": "Display Name" }.

method.description: Exported method name on the extension's exports object

label.description: Display name shown in provider dropdown

clearboxMultiAi.localEndpoints.description: Local LLM endpoints (localhost/LAN only). Each entry: { "url": "http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions", "model": "qwen2.5:7b", "label": "Ollama" }.

url.description: Must be localhost or LAN address

model.description: Model name to pass in request body

label.description: Display name shown in provider dropdown

clearboxMultiAi.defaultChainMode.description: Whether chain handoffs fire automatically or pause for Lee to confirm. HUMAN nodes always pause regardless.

clearboxMultiAi.sessionStoragePath.description: Override session storage path. Leave empty to use default: ~/.clearbox/multi_ai/sessions/

clearboxMultiAi.defaultNodes.description: Default nodes created when opening a new panel. Set to [] for blank panel.
